hooks.command:
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); [ -n "$f" ] && [ -f "$f" ] || exit 0; case "$f" in *.json) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; err=$(jq empty "$f" 2>&1) || { printf 'Invalid JSON in %s:
%s
' "$f" "$err" >&2; exit 2; }; case "$f" in */.claude-plugin/marketplace.json|*/.claude-plugin/plugin.json) out=$(claude plugin validate . 2>&1 && claude plugin validate ./plugins/saas-launch 2>&1) || { printf 'Plugin manifest validation failed:
%s
' "$out" >&2; exit 2; } ;; esac
